title: Machine Coding Round 1
subtitle: 90-minute Week 1 review build — login, dashboard, sidebar, navbar
prerequisites: day06 — custom hooks and responsive layout
expectedOutcome: Build login, dashboard, sidebar, and navbar in 90 minutes without copying old code
Demonstrate Week 1 concepts under time pressure
Identify personal weak areas for Week 2
Answer cumulative interview questions across Days 01–07
definitionOfDone: Login page with controlled inputs and basic validation
Dashboard layout with sidebar and navbar
At least two routes navigable via sidebar
Git push of machine coding attempt

tomorrowPreview.title: Weather Dashboard
tomorrowPreview.summary: Week 2 begins with API-driven applications — tomorrow you will build a Weather Dashboard combining fetch, hooks, and richer UI patterns.
